title: Performance & Optimization
subtitle: Change detection tuning, virtual scrolling, SSR, and deferrable views
description: Performance optimization in Angular spans change detection tuning, trackBy, virtual scrolling for large lists, SSR with Angular Universal, bundle optimization, and Angular 17's powerful @defer syntax for lazy UI rendering.
learningOutcomes: Profile and optimize change detection with OnPush and markForCheck
Implement trackBy correctly and explain why it matters for list performance
Set up CDK virtual scrolling for large lists
Analyze and reduce bundle sizes with the Angular build analyzer
Configure Angular Universal for server-side rendering
Use @defer with @placeholder, @loading, and @error for lazy UI
Use Angular DevTools profiler to identify performance bottlenecks
